posts.title: 3,750 Migrants To Be Dumped On Small English Village With a Population of Just 1,200, essentially replacing them overnight.

twitter.content:
This is Linton-on-Ouse in England. 
Population 1200.

The British state is planning to dump 3,750 migrants into this village and essentially replace them overnight.

Millennia of traditional rural life are about to be wiped out at the altar of open borders.

posts.title: Justice John Roberts Seemingly Contradicts Himself In Two Rulings: Slaughter & Cook. That pairing was no accident. Roberts effectively invited readers to compare the two. In Slaughter, he left open the question of whether the Federal Reserve has a unique position. Then in Cook, he said it did.

link_metadata.description: Cook and Slaughter reveal a chief justice once again trying to split the baby between constitutional principle and institutional pragmatism.
